gaps: No existing test case validates the product name displayed on onboarding screens. All 15 test cases focus on device list behavior, connection states, home screen UI, and supported devices navigation — none cover onboarding screen content accuracy.
Missing validation that onboarding screens display the correct commercial product name (e.g., 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC') rather than internal code names (e.g., 'Falcon').
Missing test for onboarding screen content after factory reset — the bug specifically manifests on first launch or after factory reset, which is a distinct state not covered.

Missing test for onboarding screen content across different device types — the bug may affect some products (code name shown) but not others, requiring device-specific validation per the domain knowledge (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ UC, Voyager Focus 2 UC, etc.).
Missing lifecycle testing for onboarding screens — e.g., what happens if the user backgrounds the app during onboarding and returns, or if the app is killed mid-onboarding and relaunched.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-001: Onboarding displays correct commercial product name (not code name) for Voyager Free 60+ UC
steps: Factory reset the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds.
Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or cleared app data).
Observe the onboarding/welcome screens as they appear.
Verify the product name displayed on each onboarding screen.
generated_testcases.expected: All onboarding screens display 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' (commercial name). Actual (If Bug): Onboarding shows 'Falcon' (internal code name) instead of the commercial product name.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-002: Onboarding displays correct commercial product name for Voyager Focus 2 UC
steps: Factory reset the Poly Voyager Focus 2 UC headset.
Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or cleared app data).
Observe the onboarding/welcome screens.
Verify the product name displayed on each onboarding screen.
generated_testcases.expected: All onboarding screens display 'Poly Voyager Focus 2 UC' (commercial name). Actual (If Bug): Onboarding shows internal code name instead of the commercial product name.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-003: Onboarding displays correct commercial product name after factory reset (re-onboarding)
steps: Pair and onboard a Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC successfully (first onboarding).
Factory reset the earbuds via the charge case touchscreen (Settings → Factory Reset).
Re-launch Poly Studio Mobile app (do NOT clear app data).
Observe the onboarding screens that appear for the re-paired device.
Verify the product name displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: After factory reset, re-onboarding screens display 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC'. Actual (If Bug): Re-onboarding shows 'Falcon' (code name) because the cached/fallback name is used instead of the commercial name.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-004: Onboarding product name persists correctly after app backgrounding and return
steps: Factory reset device. Launch app to trigger onboarding.
On the first onboarding screen, press the Home button to background the app.
Wait 30 seconds, then return to the app via the app switcher.
Verify the product name on the current onboarding screen.
generated_testcases.expected: Product name remains the commercial name ('Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC') after backgrounding and returning. Actual (If Bug): Product name reverts to code name ('Falcon') on app resume due to state loss.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-005: Onboarding product name persists correctly after app kill mid-onboarding and relaunch
steps: Factory reset device. Launch app to trigger onboarding.
On the second onboarding screen (e.g., feature intro), force-kill the app via recent apps menu.
Relaunch the app.
Observe the onboarding screens from the beginning.
Verify the product name on each screen.
generated_testcases.expected: After app kill and relaunch, onboarding screens display 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' consistently. Actual (If Bug): Product name shows 'Falcon' on relaunch because the name is loaded from an uninitialized or cached code-name fallback.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-006: Onboarding product name is correct during Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect cycle
steps: Factory reset device. Launch app to trigger onboarding.
While on an onboarding screen, disable Bluetooth on the phone.
Re-enable Bluetooth after 10 seconds.
Allow the app to reconnect and continue onboarding.
Verify the product name on the current onboarding screen.
generated_testcases.expected: Product name remains 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect during onboarding. Actual (If Bug): Product name switches to code name ('Falcon') after Bluetooth reconnection due to re-fetching device info from an incorrect source.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-007: Onboarding product name is correct when switching between multiple supported devices
steps: Factory reset both a Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC and a Poly Voyager Focus 2 UC.
Launch app with Voyager Free 60+ UC in pairing mode first. Complete onboarding — verify name is 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC'.
Remove the Voyager Free 60+ UC from the app.
Factory reset the Voyager Focus 2 UC again.
Launch onboarding for Voyager Focus 2 UC — verify name is 'Poly Voyager Focus 2 UC'.
Switch back to Voyager Free 60+ UC (re-pair and factory reset). Launch onboarding again — verify name is 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC'.
generated_testcases.expected: Each device shows its correct commercial name during onboarding regardless of which device was onboarded previously. Actual (If Bug): Second device onboarding shows the first device's code name or a generic fallback due to stale cached data.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-008: Onboarding product name is correct after phone reboot
steps: Factory reset device. Launch app to trigger onboarding.
Reach the final onboarding screen (do not complete).
Reboot the phone.
Launch the app again.
Observe the onboarding screens.
Verify the product name on each screen.
generated_testcases.expected: After phone reboot, onboarding screens display 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC'. Actual (If Bug): Product name shows 'Falcon' because the device name mapping is not restored from persistent storage after reboot.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-009: Onboarding product name is correct when device is in low battery state
steps: Drain the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds to <10% battery.
Factory reset the earbuds.
Launch app to trigger onboarding.
Verify the product name on all onboarding screens.
generated_testcases.expected: Onboarding screens display 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' even when the device battery is low. Actual (If Bug): Low battery state causes a fallback to code name ('Falcon') due to incomplete device info retrieval.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ONB-010: Onboarding product name is correct during firmware update prompt on onboarding
steps: Factory reset a Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC that has an available firmware update.
Launch app to trigger onboarding.
If a firmware update prompt appears during onboarding, observe the product name on the prompt and subsequent screens.
Verify the product name on all onboarding screens and any update dialogs.
generated_testcases.expected: Product name displays as 'Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC' on all onboarding screens and firmware update dialogs. Actual (If Bug): Firmware update dialog or onboarding screens show 'Falcon' instead of the commercial name.
